and the deity presiding over consciousness
the moon appeared after the appearance of mind
and this indicates that the moon is the presiding deity of mind
similarly Lord Brahma appearing after intelligence
is the presiding deity of intelligence
and Lord Shiva who appears after false ego
is the presiding deity of false ego
in other words it is indicated that the moon god is in the mode of goodness
whereas Lord Brahma is in the mode of passion
and Lord Shiva is in the mode of ignorance
the appearance of consciousness after the appearance of false ego
material consciousness is under the mode of ignorance
and that one therefore has to purify himself
this purificatory process is called Krishna consciousness
as soon as the consciousness is purified
identification of the body with the self
Lord Chaitanya confirms this in his
he states that the first result of chanting
is that dirt is cleared from the consciousness
or the mirror of the mind
the blazing fire of material existence
the blazing fire of material existence
but as soon as the false ego is
one can understand his real identity
at that point he is actually liberated
as soon as one is freed from the clutches of false ego
and then his mind is always engaged upon
the lotus feet of the Supreme Personality of Godhead
appeared on the full moon day
the material moon has spots on it
in order to fix the purified mind
in the service of the Supreme Lord
or those who want to exhibit their intelligence
and persons who are in the gross ignorance
and Ravana are worshippers of Lord Brahma
in the service of Krishna Consciousness

Subtle body, sukshma sharira which is made of manas, buddhi and ahankara and there is a gross body which is pancha bhuta, earth air, water, fire and ether.
So the soul identifies with this body and that identification is called ahankara of false ego.
And the root cause of our material existence is,
These days football, FIFA World Cup is happening. Anyone watching?
So if you see the, yesterday I saw one video of a blind man, he is not able to see,
but somebody is helping him through this thing.
And when goal happens, that blind man is ecstatic.
So some of us who are not watching the World Cup,
we are neither getting excited nor we are getting feeling sad. Yes or no?
Whether you score a goal or not, we are happy.
But for the people who have identified with the team,
they would have completely got messed up.

you have no, it doesn't affect you.

although I am in that sense, in Indian, it is not affecting me.
